scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=database && npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.seed: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const p = fs.existsSync('./backend/build/backend/src/mockData/seed.js') ? './backend/build/backend/src/mockData/seed.js' : './backend/build/src/mockData/seed.js'; require(p);" && node database/scripts/seedSalesReps.js && node database/scripts/seedTransactions.js
